name: Liquid Action Tab Bar
description: Floating liquid glass tab bar with an expanding action menu grid and spring physics
longDescription: A premium iOS-style floating tab bar with a separate action button (FAB) that smoothly rotates into a close button while expanding a translucent frosted-glass grid menu.
features: Dynamic active tab sliding indicator pill

props.name: tabs
props.description: Array of tab objects with id, label, and iconName

props.name: activeTabId
props.description: ID of the currently selected tab

props.name: onTabChange
props.description: Callback fired when a tab is pressed

props.name: actions
props.description: Array of action items for the expanding menu grid

props.name: isDarkMode
props.description: Toggle between light and dark frosted glass theme

props.name: accentColor
props.description: Custom color for the active indicator pill

usage.title: Basic Usage
usage.description: Render the floating tab bar above your main content. Make sure to place it absolutely at the bottom.

steps: Copy LiquidActionTabBar.tsx to your components folder
